TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Burundi hya' ga cyux maki' tay 3 30 S, 30 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 27,830 sq km (maki' tay 147ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 25,680 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 2,150 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 11,099,298. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 73.30%, lhlahuy hya' ga 6.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 20.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Bujumbura. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Pierre Nkurunziza, aring ryax 26 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2005 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. zyaw na kinbkesan lalu nya sraran ga (Urundi), mpuw tyu' na seki ini pkkang. mpuw qeru seki taring, Inko, Tko, Piris cyugang koka. 1890 kawas wal galan Tko maki qalang nha bsyaq balay kengri, kaki qalang na TsutongFe na rhyal, ru 1916 kawas myt Piris hetay wal nha htuy. te qutux pintriqan na cinbwanaa, koleng ga kaki aqonan nya Lua'ta ru Ulongti sqasuw nha, biqan nya Piris, Piris ga anay ta Kabul binah kragay ta each qalang qasa. ru tehoq te sazing pintriqan na cinbwanan tmasoq la, ru q'ta ru Ulongti lenghko mlahang qalang qasa, riyil mlahang Piris. 1959 kawas ga talah la Ulongti ru Luang ta, 1962 kawas mitu byacing qutux ryax suruw nanah, cyux msqun Pulongtiwanko . nisan surux Pulongti r'tung balay keri nya. nanu ga 1996 kawas lga, raran ga mhetay mrhuw mise'. Mikongpelo qani. tarin mgluw hetay toki ga Pulongti konghko, Pulongti maki sazing spyang qalang nya, smka na squilq ga Tusi na squilq, aring mouw typ' sci ga. hga kengri kwara qalang qani. Hutu na squilq ga qutux kumi nha ru twangan cikay Tayal Twa . yal atan cipoq na squilq qalang ta ini ta nya Psiinlungan, maki 1993 kawas mpuw byacing na toki, nisan tama pasat byacing mrhuw ga, hiya ga te qutux Hutu na squilq mrhuw, ru sengkyo sotow Me'siaw n'tataye wal kutan Tusi na squilq. sazing qalang qani ga mciriq pusan mang wal mhuqin squilq ma, ru tehok 2002 kawas lga setu na Tusi kmal muci laxi ta pciriq la, pkayal muci śįĎśóŹŤß£śĒĺŚäõťáŹ (ś≥ēŤ™ě: Conseil National Pour la D√©fense de la D√©mocratie‚ÄďForces pour la D√©fense de la D√©mocratie, CNDD‚ÄďFDD) na cyux blaq mkayal la, 2006 kawas Peru byacing mitu ryax lga, keng yaq šłČŤė≠śłĮ ru sangniya na qalang la. ŚúįÁźÜ Pulongti ga tuqux koka uzi, cyux maki beh Tobe tareku na babaw, zihung balay rhyal nya, wagiq ru unta bnux rgyaxnya, maki sazing na liyung qutux ga Nilog , qutux ga Kang koh , Lalu nua ga "Fecocqing" kwara koka ga hitocbo 27830ŚĻ≥śĖĻkongri. šĹćÁĹģ Pulong ti qalang qani ga maki tong Fectaw , qutux neru koka, cyugan kak kano nya śĚĪśé• Tasanniya , Ť•ŅťĄį Kangkomincu konghko, ŚĆó ru rua'ta, ŚąÜśįīŚ∂ļ nya ga kangkoh ru niloh. ŚúįŚĹĘ Koka na Pulongti qani ga haypa 1500 ÁĪ≥ na kawyen, Sipu' ru rua'ta ga qes, wagiq balay rgyax nya, wagiq balay ga tehoq 2760 ÁĪ≥, tehoq tansanniya lga 1300 meta in wagiq nya, sipu' kura' tansanniya lga byaq tehoq tong Fe tarekusic . śįīÁ≥Ľ Luciciru Tankanikhu maki TonFereku qasa, tankanikhu ga hopa balay na bsilung, smka ga maki beh Pulongti, ru maki qutux Ci Fuhu . kayal mkilux balay kayal nya. qutux kawas ga qsya nya ga tehoq 1200-1600 hakmi . ana maki ctaw ga beha hmswa ga mqwalah krryax. cingay balay qsya nya, hogung nya tuqiy, ana koba ru eki. heci wal horun hopa qsya, luhiy tuqiy ru hongu. Ť°ĆśĒŅŚćÄŚäÉ Pulongti qalang ga maki mpuw pitu pgleng linhoyan nya, 2002 kawas ga, pusongpusong sazing peleng linhoyan nya, qutux ga pusong pusong Śłā ra pusong pusong ťĄČ. ŚłÉÁŹ≠śČéÁúĀ Bubanza ŚłÉśĚĺŚłÉśčČŚüéŚłāÁúĀ Bujumbura Mairie ŚłÉśĚĺŚłÉśčČťĄČśĚĎÁúĀ Bujumbura Rural ŚłÉť≠ĮťáĆÁúĀ Bururi ŚĚéŚļęšĹźÁúĀ Cankuzo ťĆęśĮĒśČėŚáĪÁúĀ Cibitoke ŚüļÁČĻŚä†ÁúĀ Gitega Ść°ť≠ĮśŅüÁúĀ Karuzi Ść°śŹöśČéÁúĀ Kayanza ŚüļťĺćŚ§öÁúĀ Kirundo ť¶¨ŚĚéŚ∑īÁúĀ Makamba Á©ÜśčČŚßÜÁ∂≠šļěÁúĀ Muramvya Á©ÜŚõ†Śä†ÁúĀ Muyinga Á©ÜÁď¶śīõÁúĀ Mwaro śĀ©śąąťĹäÁúĀ Ngozi ť≠ĮŚ°ĒÁīćÁúĀ Rutana ť≠ĮšľäŚźČÁúĀ Ruyigi ggalan pila kefe ru Ocya ga Pulongti spyang ggalan na pila, qutux qutux kawas ga mita kayak blaq ga ru yaqeh kanaal, ru qlangan na squilq lga, ungat than nha uzi la. Pulongti qalang qani ga spijl balay na pbahuw ga: guqoh, qetung, kawlyang, spyal cingay ga guqoh. pqmqhun/pqumah Pulongti koka mani ga pqumah spijl ggalan nha, ana ga ini qbaq mqumah ru czyaw zyaw na qmayeh, spyal na pbahuw ga mak i: kafe, menhwa, susu, qerang, ngahi, luri, guqoh, kawlyang, bonaw, marinsuru, layang;kwening, saping, nuka na abura, tbaku, pagay ru saping abura , spyal balay na pinbahu' ga musa qerang ru ngahi, menhwa, yuye. ÁēúÁČßś•≠ kinbahan na zyaw ga zyuwaw na pnqnyatan, qnayat nha ga qluyah qehuy na kacing, m√≠t ru manyang. zyuwaw na quilh sezon qmayat qulih maki ben Tankanik śĻĖ, 2005 kawas nagan nha quilh ga 14200 kontung . Á§¶ś•≠ Pulongti koka mani ga ungat kuangcan nha, wayal raran ga maki cikay si , u ru king, aring sarren ru tehoq misuw ga ini kinky kuangcan qani na. zyuwaw na rengki zyuwaw na rengki ga nisan taring na, kafe ru menhua nanak cyogun nha na, ru bŠĽČu, naqiy kbalay, 2007 kawas rentki nya ga 9200 Ťź¨Śļ¶ . ttuqi ini blaq ttuqi nha, ungat kisya nha uzi, qluyuh na tai ga 12322 congri, 1286 congri tuqi na amutu, te sazing lga cynglu 3700 congri, thay lga tuqi rgyax la. ini hga blaq kmalay, yaqeh balay kngyan. basu nha ga 4800 Ťľõ nanak basu ga kura tansanniya, pusongpula, puson pusola skoki, maki musa beh Oco, kangko mincukonghko ru Tongfe. koci petugan qeqaya' osa qalang binah maki tbiran peyugan qeqaya' ga, 2009 kawas kwara toto ga 6800 mang pila na Amirika, spyang tbagiy na qaya' ga kafe, ocya, sato, menhwa ru hnkuyÁćłś≥Ę, spyang tbiran na koka ga Zes, Inko, Pacistan, Piris, Ruanta ru Ici. kahul qalang binah Pulangti koka maki 2009 kawas kwara thana nya ga 2.75 ik Amirika na pila, spyal mwah koka na qeqaya ga kikay, abura, nniqun. spyal na koka ga sautialapo, Piris, Ukanta, Kngya, Cyukok, Fako, Intu, Tansanniya ru Zipung. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

qulińß maki ő≤en tankanik *, **** kawas~…ē na…£an nńßa quilńß …£a ***** kontuŇč . ** puloŇčti koka mani …£a uŇčat kuaŇč ¶~ ®an nńßa, wajal raran …£a maki ¶~ ®ikaj s~…ēi , u ru kiŇč, ariŇč s~…ēarren ru la. ini ńß…£a ő≤laq kmalaj, jaqeńß ő≤alaj kŇčjan. ő≤as~…ēu nńßa …£a **** * nanak ő≤as~…ēu …£a kura tans~…ēannija, pus~…ēoŇčpula, pus~…ēon pus~…ēola s~…ēkoki, maki mus~…ēa ő≤eńß o ¶~ ®o, kaŇčko min ¶~ ®ukoŇčńßko ru toŇč*e. ko ¶~ ®i petu…£an qeqaja Ē os~…ēa qalaŇč ő≤inańß maki tő≤iran peju…£an qeqaja Ē …£a, **** kawas~…ē kwara toto …£a **** maŇč pila na amirika, s~…ēpjaŇč tő≤a…£ij na qaja Ē …£a ka*e, o ¶~ ®ja, s~…ēato, menńßwa ru ńßnkuj**, s~…ēpjaŇč tő≤iran na koka …£a zes~…ē, inko, pa ¶~ ®is~…ētan, piris~…ē, ruanta ru i ¶~ ®i. kańßul qalaŇč ő≤inańß pulaŇčti koka maki **** kawas~…ē kwara tńßana nja …£a *.** ik amirika na pila, s~…ēpjal mwańß koka na qeqaja …£a kikaj, aő≤ura, nniqun. s~…ēpjal na koka …£a s~…ēautialapo, piris~…ē, ukanta, kŇčja, ¶~ ®jukok, *ako, intu, tans~…ēannija ru zipuŇč. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Burundi hya' ga cyux maki' tay 3 30 S, 30 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 27,830 sq km (maki' tay 147ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 25,680 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 2,150 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 11,099,298. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 73.30%, lhlahuy hya' ga 6.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 20.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Bujumbura. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Pierre Nkurunziza, aring ryax 26 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2005 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. zyaw na kinbkesan lalu nya sraran ga (Urundi), mpuw tyu' na seki ini pkkang. mpuw qeru seki taring, Inko, Tko, Piris cyugang koka. 1890 kawas wal galan Tko maki qalang nha bsyaq balay kengri, kaki qalang na TsutongFe na rhyal, ru 1916 kawas myt Piris hetay wal nha htuy. te qutux pintriqan na cinbwanaa, koleng ga kaki aqonan nya Lua'ta ru Ulongti sqasuw nha, biqan nya Piris, Piris ga anay ta Kabul binah kragay ta each qalang qasa. ru tehoq te sazing pintriqan na cinbwanan tmasoq la, ru q'ta ru Ulongti lenghko mlahang qalang qasa, riyil mlahang Piris. 1959 kawas ga talah la Ulongti ru Luang ta, 1962 kawas mitu byacing qutux ryax suruw nanah, cyux msqun Pulongtiwanko . nisan surux Pulongti r'tung balay keri nya. nanu ga 1996 kawas lga, raran ga mhetay mrhuw mise'. Mikongpelo qani. tarin mgluw hetay toki ga Pulongti konghko, Pulongti maki sazing spyang qalang nya, smka na squilq ga Tusi na squilq, aring mouw typ' sci ga. hga kengri kwara qalang qani. Hutu na squilq ga qutux kumi nha ru twangan cikay Tayal Twa . yal atan cipoq na squilq qalang ta ini ta nya Psiinlungan, maki 1993 kawas mpuw byacing na toki, nisan tama pasat byacing mrhuw ga, hiya ga te qutux Hutu na squilq mrhuw, ru sengkyo sotow Me'siaw n'tataye wal kutan Tusi na squilq. sazing qalang qani ga mciriq pusan mang wal mhuqin squilq ma, ru tehok 2002 kawas lga setu na Tusi kmal muci laxi ta pciriq la, pkayal muci śįĎśóŹŤß£śĒĺŚäõťáŹ (ś≥ēŤ™ě: Conseil National Pour la D√©fense de la D√©mocratie‚ÄďForces pour la D√©fense de la D√©mocratie, CNDD‚ÄďFDD) na cyux blaq mkayal la, 2006 kawas Peru byacing mitu ryax lga, keng yaq šłČŤė≠śłĮ ru sangniya na qalang la. ŚúįÁźÜ Pulongti ga tuqux koka uzi, cyux maki beh Tobe tareku na babaw, zihung balay rhyal nya, wagiq ru unta bnux rgyaxnya, maki sazing na liyung qutux ga Nilog , qutux ga Kang koh , Lalu nua ga "Fecocqing" kwara koka ga hitocbo 27830ŚĻ≥śĖĻkongri. šĹćÁĹģ Pulong ti qalang qani ga maki tong Fectaw , qutux neru koka, cyugan kak kano nya śĚĪśé• Tasanniya , Ť•ŅťĄį Kangkomincu konghko, ŚĆó ru rua'ta, ŚąÜśįīŚ∂ļ nya ga kangkoh ru niloh. ŚúįŚĹĘ Koka na Pulongti qani ga haypa 1500 ÁĪ≥ na kawyen, Sipu' ru rua'ta ga qes, wagiq balay rgyax nya, wagiq balay ga tehoq 2760 ÁĪ≥, tehoq tansanniya lga 1300 meta in wagiq nya, sipu' kura' tansanniya lga byaq tehoq tong Fe tarekusic . śįīÁ≥Ľ Luciciru Tankanikhu maki TonFereku qasa, tankanikhu ga hopa balay na bsilung, smka ga maki beh Pulongti, ru maki qutux Ci Fuhu . kayal mkilux balay kayal nya. qutux kawas ga qsya nya ga tehoq 1200-1600 hakmi . ana maki ctaw ga beha hmswa ga mqwalah krryax. cingay balay qsya nya, hogung nya tuqiy, ana koba ru eki. heci wal horun hopa qsya, luhiy tuqiy ru hongu. Ť°ĆśĒŅŚćÄŚäÉ Pulongti qalang ga maki mpuw pitu pgleng linhoyan nya, 2002 kawas ga, pusongpusong sazing peleng linhoyan nya, qutux ga pusong pusong Śłā ra pusong pusong ťĄČ. ŚłÉÁŹ≠śČéÁúĀ Bubanza ŚłÉśĚĺŚłÉśčČŚüéŚłāÁúĀ Bujumbura Mairie ŚłÉśĚĺŚłÉśčČťĄČśĚĎÁúĀ Bujumbura Rural ŚłÉť≠ĮťáĆÁúĀ Bururi ŚĚéŚļęšĹźÁúĀ Cankuzo ťĆęśĮĒśČėŚáĪÁúĀ Cibitoke ŚüļÁČĻŚä†ÁúĀ Gitega Ść°ť≠ĮśŅüÁúĀ Karuzi Ść°śŹöśČéÁúĀ Kayanza ŚüļťĺćŚ§öÁúĀ Kirundo ť¶¨ŚĚéŚ∑īÁúĀ Makamba Á©ÜśčČŚßÜÁ∂≠šļěÁúĀ Muramvya Á©ÜŚõ†Śä†ÁúĀ Muyinga Á©ÜÁď¶śīõÁúĀ Mwaro śĀ©śąąťĹäÁúĀ Ngozi ť≠ĮŚ°ĒÁīćÁúĀ Rutana ť≠ĮšľäŚźČÁúĀ Ruyigi ggalan pila kefe ru Ocya ga Pulongti spyang ggalan na pila, qutux qutux kawas ga mita kayak blaq ga ru yaqeh kanaal, ru qlangan na squilq lga, ungat than nha uzi la. Pulongti qalang qani ga spijl balay na pbahuw ga: guqoh, qetung, kawlyang, spyal cingay ga guqoh. pqmqhun/pqumah Pulongti koka mani ga pqumah spijl ggalan nha, ana ga ini qbaq mqumah ru czyaw zyaw na qmayeh, spyal na pbahuw ga mak i: kafe, menhwa, susu, qerang, ngahi, luri, guqoh, kawlyang, bonaw, marinsuru, layang;kwening, saping, nuka na abura, tbaku, pagay ru saping abura , spyal balay na pinbahu' ga musa qerang ru ngahi, menhwa, yuye. ÁēúÁČßś•≠ kinbahan na zyaw ga zyuwaw na pnqnyatan, qnayat nha ga qluyah qehuy na kacing, m√≠t ru manyang. zyuwaw na quilh sezon qmayat qulih maki ben Tankanik śĻĖ, 2005 kawas nagan nha quilh ga 14200 kontung . Á§¶ś•≠ Pulongti koka mani ga ungat kuangcan nha, wayal raran ga maki cikay si , u ru king, aring sarren ru tehoq misuw ga ini kinky kuangcan qani na. zyuwaw na rengki zyuwaw na rengki ga nisan taring na, kafe ru menhua nanak cyogun nha na, ru bŠĽČu, naqiy kbalay, 2007 kawas rentki nya ga 9200 Ťź¨Śļ¶ . ttuqi ini blaq ttuqi nha, ungat kisya nha uzi, qluyuh na tai ga 12322 congri, 1286 congri tuqi na amutu, te sazing lga cynglu 3700 congri, thay lga tuqi rgyax la. ini hga blaq kmalay, yaqeh balay kngyan. basu nha ga 4800 Ťľõ nanak basu ga kura tansanniya, pusongpula, puson pusola skoki, maki musa beh Oco, kangko mincukonghko ru Tongfe. koci petugan qeqaya' osa qalang binah maki tbiran peyugan qeqaya' ga, 2009 kawas kwara toto ga 6800 mang pila na Amirika, spyang tbagiy na qaya' ga kafe, ocya, sato, menhwa ru hnkuyÁćłś≥Ę, spyang tbiran na koka ga Zes, Inko, Pacistan, Piris, Ruanta ru Ici. kahul qalang binah Pulangti koka maki 2009 kawas kwara thana nya ga 2.75 ik Amirika na pila, spyal mwah koka na qeqaya ga kikay, abura, nniqun. spyal na koka ga sautialapo, Piris, Ukanta, Kngya, Cyukok, Fako, Intu, Tansanniya ru Zipung. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
